Zombie ApocalypseZombie ApocalypseComplete MatureCompleteMatureReadsReads 833,252833,252833KVotesVotes 28,94928,94928.9KPartsParts 343434TimeTime 2h 41m2 hours, 41 minutes2h 41mOnce New Orleans became infected with the "Dark flu" everything changed. School became a doctors appointment and adults beame freakishly worried parents. Just as everyone was getting used to the daily checks, the flu suddenly became deadly. But not everyone is staying dead. Carmen, a normal 17 year old student become's a leader of a group of scared teenagers defending themselves against the walking dead, while trying to stay alive and find safe ground, Romace sparks, voilence grows and friendship becomes the only upperhand. Will Carmen and all her pack survive? 𝐈𝐭 𝐓𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐬 𝐀 𝐋𝐨𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐋𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐚 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐟 ᵛⁱᶜᵗᵒʳ ⁻ ᶻᵒᵐᵇⁱᵉˢ ⁴𝐈𝐭 𝐓𝐚𝐤𝐞𝐬 𝐀 𝐋𝐨𝐭 𝐭𝐨 𝐋𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐚 𝐋𝐞𝐚𝐟 ᵛⁱᶜᵗᵒʳ ⁻ ᶻᵒᵐᵇⁱᵉˢ ⁴CompleteCompleteReadsReads 103,543103,543103KVotesVotes 2,4292,4292.4KPartsParts 212121TimeTime 3h 37m3 hours, 37 minutes3h 37m❛❛  Anyone can love a rose, but it takes a lot to love a leaf.
                                        It's ordinary to love the beautiful, but it's beautiful to love the ordinary.  ❜❜
                                                → unknown
                                  
                                  ┌──────┐
                                  
                                  #2 in ZOMBIES - 01 / 01 / 2026
                                  #2 in VAMPIRES - 01 / 26 / 2026
                                  #1 in DISNEYZOMBIES - 02 / 07 / 2026
                                  #2 in VARGAS - 02 / 11 / 2026
                                  #5 in ZOMBIES4 - 02 / 17 / 2026
                                  
                                  ✧༺♥༻✧
                                  
                                  cover by @-brooklynbxby
                                  
                                  ✧༺♥༻✧
                                  
                                  "Eliza?" Charlotte said, internally curling into herself. Nova had already looked weirdly at her. But this was different, having the eyes of the vampires, daywalkers and all of her friends felt suffocating. Why did people have to look at the person who was speaking? "Could you, uh," she made a throwing motion with her arms, "you know?"
                                  
                                  But before the brunette could turn around, it had seemed the zombie and her were on the same wavelength. Before she could even turn around the zombie chucked a pine cone at the area above the gate, making a blue transparent wall become visible, bouncing the projectile off, and into the mulch below.
                                  
                                  "OH GOODNESS!" Charlotte exclaimed at the loud zapping noise that came from the barrier, jumping slightly. She had always been a jumpy person, that much hadn't changed no matter how many monsters she met. "Well, I suppose I was right?" She squeaked, holding her hand over her heart as she tried to regulate her breathing, her gaze flicking to the impromptu projectile the zombie girl had used. "Oh, that poor pine cone."
                                  
                                  ✧༺♥༻✧
                                  
                                  𝐚𝐜𝐭 𝐨𝐧𝐞

The Virus Within: Third Wave (Book 2)The Virus Within: Third Wave (Book 2)Wattpad Original  CompleteCompleteReadsReads 685,251685,251685KVotesVotes 53,30053,30053.3KPartsParts 858585TimeTime 21h 12m21 hours, 12 minutes21h 12mThe third wave is looming, mere weeks away, but in the aftermath of a zombie apocalypse, problems never come just one at a time.
                                  
                                  Season 2 of The Virus Within
                                  
                                  *    *   *   *   *
                                  
                                  Life isn't easy, and that's doubly true when you're a zombie surrounded by humans, a crazy redhead, and a far-too-curious scientist. Once you add in a long-lost sister and a Terror who doesn't know how to zombie, peace and quiet are the last things you'll find.
                                  
                                  Reports of a Nightstalker attack come mere weeks before the third wave is due, and Trinity is one of the few who have the necessary skills to take on such a zombie. Leaving her sister in the safety of the Stronghold, Trinity joins the rest of the group as they embark on a road trip to locate the feral creature before it can kill anyone else. Trouble looms on the horizon like a thunderstorm, and where there's thunder, there's lightning.
                                  
                                  You better pack your dish soap because the third wave isn't waiting for anyone.
                                  
                                  Cover designed by Marie TilmantThe Virus Within: Third Wave (Book 2)The Virus Within: Third Wave (Book 2)Wattpad Original  CompleteCompleteReadsReads 685,251685,251685KVotesVotes 53,30053,30053.3KPartsParts 858585TimeTime 21h 12m21 hours, 12 minutes21h 12mThe third wave is looming, mere weeks away, but in the aftermath of a zombie apocalypse, problems never come just one at a time.

UndeadUndeadComplete MatureCompleteMatureReadsReads 19,95319,95319.9KVotesVotes 826826826PartsParts 585858TimeTime 5h 52m5 hours, 52 minutes5h 52mBeing trapped inside one place most of your life is suffocating. So I took it upon myself to go behind my mother's back every chance I got to leave. I never thought that one day I would be caught. My mother agrees to let me go to school with the neighboring pack's alpha. She only agreed to prove to me that was a monster to other species. To her a Vampire demon should never be left unattended. She may be right most of the times. This time I think my mother could be wrong. 
                                  
                                  Mother doubted me only to be proved wrong. I can coexist with wolves, I've been doing it for years. Now the humans. They are tempting for a hybrid like me. I can push past their tempting blood for 8 hours each day. The thing is I might not want to but I can. Life just keep throwing obstacles my way. Now I have a beloved. An extremely tempting beloved. My demon loves the taste of blood. How long before she gets a taste or our mates?UndeadUndeadComplete MatureCompleteMatureReadsReads 19,95319,95319.9KVotesVotes 826826826PartsParts 585858TimeTime 5h 52m5 hours, 52 minutes5h 52mBeing trapped inside one place most of your life is suffocating.                                   Mother doubted me only to be proved wrong. I can coexist with wolves, I've been doing it for years. Now the humans. They are tempting for a hybrid like me. I can push past their tempting blood for 8 hours each day. The thing is I might not want to but I can. Life just keep throwing obstacles my way. Now I have a beloved. An extremely tempting beloved. My demon loves the taste of blood. How long before she gets a taste or our mates?

Finding HumanityFinding HumanityWattpad Original  CompleteCompleteReadsReads 4,361,0534,361,0534.3MVotesVotes 254,615254,615254KPartsParts 929292TimeTime 9h 8m9 hours, 8 minutes9h 8mAfter escaping a stalled elevator into a zombie apocalypse, Emily must learn how to trust people again or risk losing everything in this terrifying world.
                                   
                                                                                                        ***** 
                                   
                                  For Emily, every day of the last two years have been a blur. She keeps her head down, takes her college courses online, and only goes out to work at her mandatory internship. But all that changes on the day the office elevator breaks down, leaving her trapped when the screams begin. And when the doors finally open, revealing a dystopian world ruined by bloody teeth and disease, Emily is launched into a terrifying run for her life, caught between the strangers she's not sure she can trust and the man-eating monsters that hunger for her flesh. Now she must learn not only how to survive in this new and dangerous world, but also how to overcome her own inner demons before they cost her something more precious than her life.
                                  
                                  [[Wattys' Shortlist]]
                                  [[Promoted by AMC]]
                                  
                                  Content and/or Trigger Warning: The story contains some gore, violence, strong language, and dark themes.

Zombie ParadeZombie ParadeCompleteCompleteReadsReads 130,802130,802130KVotesVotes 3,0413,0413KPartsParts 353535TimeTime 6h 8m6 hours, 8 minutes6h 8mPercy Jackson has a set of rules to survive the zombie apocalypse. These rules helped him endure the grueling months of zombies trying to eat his brains and humans trying to exploit his resources. However, a random encounter forces him to join a group of survivors. 
                                  
                                  Annabeth Chase is very smart and strong. Zombies are no match for her intelligence and leadership qualities. Her main responsibility is to keep everyone in her group of survivors alive. But, after the arrival of Percy, her life becomes inexplicably complicated. 
                                  
                                  Survivors always have the same questions. Why did they survive? And, will there ever be an end to the apocalypse? My Undead TypeMy Undead TypeCompleteCompleteReadsReads 2,9822,9822.9KVotesVotes 212121PartsParts 222222TimeTime 1h 31m1 hours, 31 minutes1h 31m"We're about to be up all night waking up a zombie! So put your paws all over me, you zombie boy."
                                  
                                  Lana Nyx never thought her time at Nevermore Academy would involve actual resurrection.
                                  She's the oldest in her year-mature, composed, and used to cleaning up everyone else's chaos. But when she stumbles into the Hummers' shed and finds Pugsley Addams and Eugene Ottinger bringing a boy back to life-a boy with a clockwork heart-her world tilts in all the weirdest ways.
                                  
                                  Now she can't stop thinking about him.

Why does he have a heartbeat made of gears and lightning-and why does a zombie look that good?My Undead TypeMy Undead TypeCompleteCompleteReadsReads 2,9822,9822.9KVotesVotes 212121PartsParts 222222TimeTime 1h 31m1 hours, 31 minutes1h 31m"We're about to be up all night waking up a zombie! So put your paws all over me, you zombie boy."
                                  
                                  Lana Nyx never thought her time at Nevermore Academy would involve actual resurrection.
                                  She's the oldest in her year-mature, composed, and used to cleaning up everyone else's chaos. But when she stumbles into the Hummers' shed and finds Pugsley Addams and Eugene Ottinger bringing a boy back to life-a boy with a clockwork heart-her world tilts in all the weirdest ways.
                                  
                                  Now she can't stop thinking about him.
                                  Who is he? Why does he have a heartbeat made of gears and lightning-and why does a zombie look that good?

Zombie RotZombie RotOngoing MatureOngoingMatureReadsReads 2,8992,8992.8KVotesVotes 112112112PartsParts 181818TimeTime 2h 41m2 hours, 41 minutes2h 41mIdk if anyone's ever written something like this, but it sounds pretty cool in my head. 
                                  
                                  Sterek and zombies. Zombie apocalypse. And yes there are still werewolves/Coyotes/ect., but that's it, no other supernatural's. The werewolves healing abilities pretty much stop them from becoming a zombie. Instead becoming more feral like, as if a lighter version of rabies- rouge wolves- like crazy Peter. 
                                  
                                  ------------------------
                                  It all starts with a bad idea, stiles and his group of survivors trying to find somewhere safe to hide. How bad can taking refuge in an old town, and old burnt up house be when you've got zombies literally searching for living flesh to chew on. Stiles kicks aside his four barrel shot gun as Scott watches him angrily beat at what must've been an old table, or door side table of sorts, after losing a member of their group. She was strong, and close to stiles as they bonded over their versions of how the whole world wreck started. Of course that's besides the point when a hunky man, or correction, werewolf man drops down the steps of the broken home. 
                                  
                                  Then again, that certain werewolf seems to have Both caught and given his attention to stiles. The human finding the large muscled, broad, stone faced, blunt man just as interesting as the wolf found the rambling, loud, leading, beautiful Human, interesting. 
                                  How a connection grows, even with impending threats and struggles digging at their ankles with ever step, and becomes something so crazy, so much larger, and so much more.

The UndeadThe UndeadComplete MatureCompleteMatureReadsReads 5,1205,1205.1KVotesVotes 186186186PartsParts 383838TimeTime 12h 44m12 hours, 44 minutes12h 44mWhen a secretive research site ends up making the mistake of a lifetime, the world slowly descends into chaos. It's only ever been seen in movies, but there's no other way to describe what happened to the earth and the people living on it, other than an apocalypse. A group of humans stick together to try their best to survive, they eventually lose their home, forcing them to travel and find a new one, they make friends and enemies along the way, but they manage to find quite an odd group of survivors, if they can even be called that. The humans, desperate to survive yet scared for their lives, have to decide, do they risk trusting a group of talking robots, or do they take their chances on their own.

The Virus Within: The Road Ahead (Book 1 - SERIES COMPLETED!)The Virus Within: The Road Ahead (Book 1 - SERIES COMPLETED!)Wattpad Original  CompleteCompleteReadsReads 7,534,2437,534,2437.5MVotesVotes 376,586376,586376KPartsParts 919191TimeTime 21h 52m21 hours, 52 minutes21h 52mIf dish soap, rutabagas, and firecrackers aren't an essential part of your zombie apocalypse kit, you better grab them now!
                                  
                                  Season 1 of The Virus Within
                                  (SERIES IS COMPLETED!)
                                  
                                     *   *   *   *   *   *   *
                                  
                                  Trinity fights against the bloodthirsty influences of the zombie virus as she searches for her sister, hoping to find her still alive among the scattered survivors. But even if Trinity manages to find her, how will Jess react when she discovers Trinity is a zombie?
                                  
                                  When a group of survivors gets stranded by a vehicle malfunction, Trinity decides to guide them to safety. Rediscovering her sense of humor was the last thing she ever expected, but it just might be her best defense in keeping her humanity, especially on a zombie-infested road trip with more bad luck than potholes.
                                  
                                  But time is running out as the third wave of the deadly outbreak rapidly spreads. Trinity must decide if she can trust a backwater scientist who thinks she can help her new friends, all while combating the effects of the virus that threatens to steal what's left of her humanity.

Undead AttractionUndead AttractionComplete MatureCompleteMatureReadsReads 1,7431,7431.7KVotesVotes 160160160PartsParts 272727TimeTime 2h 39m2 hours, 39 minutes2h 39mThe cameras were supposed to stop rolling, but the nightmare had just begun.
                                  
                                  During a filming break, a zombie outbreak spreads across Bangkok, turning the country into a land of the undead. Trapped together in a collapsing world, GMMTV's most iconic BL actors must now fight to survive, not as characters but as themselves.
                                  
                                  Actors who were once known for making hearts melt on screen are now facing blood, terror, and a lot of heartbreaking choices. Forced into hiding and scavenging through ruins to find food and survive, they cling to each other in moments of silence, fear... and something more.
                                  
                                  As danger lurks in every corner, bonds deepen and old feelings reignite. Some find unexpected love, while others struggle with acceptance, fear, and regret. But the undead aren't the only threat. When the infected begin retaining fragments of emotion and memory, can love endure in a world where death never sleeps
                                  
                                  Main CP:
                                  - FirstKhao
                                  - BounPrem
                                  
                                  Side CP:
                                  - TayNew
                                  - TayGun (?)
                                  
                                  
                                  Ps: 
                                  They were shipped on screen. Now they're fighting to stay alive, together. 
                                  
                                  Who knows, they might've found new friends from different industries to come along with them.
